name: AIUC-1 Controls Framework
description: AIUC-1 is a controls framework for AI/ML systems published by AIUC, designed to inform AI underwriting and insurance/risk-transfer decisions. Covers technical and governance controls for production AI systems.
relationToCloudSecurity: Many AI systems run on cloud infrastructure; AIUC-1 controls overlap with cloud-platform controls (identity, secrets, audit logging) when applied to cloud-hosted AI.
relationToAISecurity: AIUC-1 is AI-specific. Companion to other AI control frameworks (CSA AICM, NIST AI RMF, ISO/IEC 42001) but with a distinctive focus on insurability and risk transfer.

license.notes: AIUC-1 license terms should be verified at aiuc.com before redistribution.

current_extraction.notes: AIUC-1 data extracted to CSV/JSON via extract_to_csv.py (in same directory).

notes: Newer AI-specific controls framework with an insurance underwriting focus.
